databrew.job.databaseoutput.CfnAbout: Represents a JDBC database output object which defines the output destination for a DataBrew recipe job to write into.

databrew.job.databaseoutput.DatabaseOpti.Description: Represents options that specify how and where DataBrew writes the database output generated by recipe jobs.

databrew.job.databaseoutput.DatabaseOutp.Description: The output mode to write into the database. Currently supported option: NEW_TABLE.

databrew.job.databaseoutput.GlueConnecti.Description: The AWS Glue connection that stores the connection information for the target database.
